mysite
Table of Contents

Namespace BLL.Services

Classes

AgendaService

Business logic service for configuring and querying a sports space's weekly operating schedule (agenda).

ClienteService

Business logic service for client lifecycle management.

EjercicioService

Business logic service for managing the exercise catalog.

EspacioService

Business logic service for sports space (espacio) management.

IngresoService

Read-only service for querying facility check-in (ingreso) history.

MembresiaService

Business logic service for membership plan management.

PagoService

Business logic service for payment registration, refunds, and receipt management.

ReservaService

Business logic service for reservation management.

RutinaService

Business logic service for workout routine lifecycle management.

Made with docfx
